feat.name: Fey
feat.text: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid. You are immune to spells that only affect humanoids (Hold Person, Charm Person, Dominate Person, etc.).

feat.name: Magic Resistance
feat.text: You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

feat.name: Mirthful Leaps
feat.text: Whenever you make a long or high jump, you can roll a d8 and add the number rolled to the number of feet you cover, even when making a standing jump.

feat.name: Ram
feat.text: You can use your head and horns to make unarmed strikes. When you hit, you deal 1d4 + STR bludgeoning damage.

feat.name: Reveler
feat.text: Proficiency in Performance and Persuasion. Proficiency with one musical instrument of your choice.

feat.name: Languages
feat.text: You can speak, read, and write Common, Sylvan, and Draconic (Scale of Sardior).

class.name: Bard (College of Eloquence)
class.weapons: Simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords
class.tools: Three musical instruments of your choice

feat.name: Bardic Inspiration (d20)
feat.text: BONUS ACTION. Choose one creature within 60 feet who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die (d20 via Soulstring Banjo). 5 uses per SHORT REST (CHA modifier).

feat.name: UNSETTLING WORDS
feat.text: BONUS ACTION. Spend 1 Bardic Inspiration use. Target within 60ft subtracts your Inspiration die (d20) from their NEXT SAVING THROW before your next turn. COMBO: Use before Hold Monster for devastating save penalty.

feat.name: Silver Tongue
feat.text: When you make a Persuasion or Deception check, treat any d20 roll of 9 or lower as 10. With Expertise (+12) + CHA (+5): minimum 27. With Glibness (floor 15): minimum 32.

feat.name: Unfailing Inspiration
feat.text: When an ally uses your Bardic Inspiration die and STILL FAILS, they KEEP the die.

feat.name: Universal Speech
feat.text: ACTION. Up to 5 creatures within 60ft understand you for 1 hour regardless of language. 1/long rest or expend a spell slot.

feat.name: Infectious Inspiration
feat.text: REACTION. When creature within 60ft succeeds using your Bardic Inspiration, give ANOTHER creature within 60ft a die WITHOUT expending a use. 5/long rest.

feat.name: Jack of All Trades
feat.text: Add +3 (half proficiency) to any ability check without your proficiency bonus. Includes Initiative and Counterspell/Dispel checks.

feat.name: Song of Rest (d12)
feat.text: Short rest: allies who spend Hit Dice regain extra 1d12 HP.

feat.name: Expertise
feat.text: Double proficiency (+12) for: Persuasion (+17, floor 27/32), Deception (+17, floor 27/32), Performance (+17), Perception (+13).

feat.name: Countercharm
feat.text: ACTION. 1 minute: you and allies within 30ft have advantage vs frightened/charmed.

feat.name: Magical Secrets (Level 10)
feat.text: Counterspell (3rd), Find Greater Steed (4th)

feat.name: Magical Secrets (Level 14)
feat.text: Haste (3rd), Aura of Vitality (3rd)

feat.name: Soulstring Banjo (Mythic Artifact)
feat.text: Forged by Dorgan. Two Canaith Banjos + Strings of Silenced Choir (100 bard souls) + Fifth’s soul. TWO SOULS ONE SONG: Bardic Inspiration = d20. CRESCENDO OF SOULS (1/day): Action. 60ft. CON DC 19. Fail: 8d8 thunder + stunned 1 rd. SOUL RESONANCE (1/day): Fifth acts 1 min if you are incapacitated. HARMONIC SHIELD: Advantage vs charm, fear, psychic while holding. UNBREAKABLE BOND: Cannot be destroyed. Regenerates 24h. Teleports back 100ft+. THE CHOIR REMEMBERS (1/day): Ask about music/bardic magic. Cryptic true answer. DAILY SPELLS (2/day each): Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, Prot Energy, Cure Wounds 3rd, Dispel Magic.

feat.name: Resonance Key (Rare, Attuned)
feat.text: SOUL SPEECH: Fifth speaks words. HARMONIC AMPLIFICATION (1/long rest): Next Inspiration = d20+10 (min 11, max 30). CRESCENDO MAGNIFICATION (1/long rest): 120ft, 12d8, stun 2 rounds.

spell.name: Vicious Mockery
spell.text: WIS save DC 19 or 4d4 psychic + disadvantage on next attack. SAFE DEFAULT ACTION.

spell.name: Minor Illusion
spell.text: Sound or image (max 5ft cube). Investigation DC 19 to see through.

spell.name: Prestidigitation
spell.text: Minor tricks: sensory effects, clean/soil, light/snuff, flavor, trinkets. Up to 3 at once.

spell.name: Mage Hand
spell.text: Spectral hand, manipulate objects up to 10 lb.

spell.name: Healing Word
spell.text: BA. 1d4+5 healing. Upcast +1d4/level. PICK UP DOWNED ALLIES AT RANGE.

spell.name: Silvery Barbs
spell.text: REACTION. Force reroll on success, take lower. Give ally advantage on next roll. COMPETES WITH COUNTERSPELL.

spell.name: Faerie Fire
spell.text: 20ft cube. DEX DC 19 or outlined. Attacks have ADVANTAGE. Negates invisibility.

spell.name: Suggestion
spell.text: WIS DC 19 or follow reasonable suggestion 8 hours. CONCENTRATION.

spell.name: Hold Person
spell.text: WIS DC 19 or PARALYZED (auto-crit melee). Humanoids only. Repeat save EOT. Upcast +1 target/slot.

spell.name: Misty Step
spell.text: BA. Teleport 30ft to visible space. ESCAPE BUTTON.

spell.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spell.text: 30ft cube. WIS DC 19 or CHARMED + INCAPACITATED + speed 0. Ends on damage or shaken.

spell.name: Counterspell
spell.text: [SECRET] Auto 3rd or lower. Higher: d20+11. With Glibness: floor 26, auto vs 8th or lower.

spell.name: Haste
spell.text: [SECRET] +2 AC, x2 speed, advantage DEX saves, extra Attack. IF DROPPED: target loses turn.

spell.name: Aura of Vitality
spell.text: [SECRET] BA: one creature in 30ft regains 2d6 HP. 20d6 total over 10 rounds.

spell.name: Greater Invisibility
spell.text: Invisible for duration. Does NOT end on attack/cast. CONCENTRATION.

spell.name: Dimension Door
spell.text: Teleport 500ft + one willing creature. Can describe unseen destination. EXTRACTION.

spell.name: Find Greater Steed
spell.text: [SECRET] Summon Pegasus (90ft fly, 59 HP). Telepathic 1mi. Self-spells affect mount. Permanent.

spell.name: Hold Monster
spell.text: WIS DC 19 or PARALYZED. ANY creature. Repeat save EOT. COMBO: Unsettling Words then this.

spell.name: Greater Restoration
spell.text: End one: charmed, petrified, curse, ability reduction, HP max reduction. 100gp cost.

spell.name: Mass Suggestion
spell.text: Up to 12 creatures. WIS DC 19 or follow suggestion 24 hours. NO CONCENTRATION.

spell.name: Forcecage
spell.text: 10ft cage or 20ft box. NO SAVE. Teleport out = CHA DC 19. 1 hour. No concentration. 1500gp.

spell.name: Glibness
spell.text: Replace CHA check d20 with 15 for 1 hour. Persuasion/Deception floor 32. Counterspell floor 26. Detected as truthful.

spell.name: Mind Blank
spell.text: 24h: IMMUNE psychic, thought-reading, divination, charmed. DAILY SELF-CAST.

spell.name: Foresight
spell.text: 8h: Advantage attacks/checks/saves. Enemies disadvantage vs target. No surprise. NO CONCENTRATION. DAILY ON FIGHTER.

background.name: Outlander
background.personality: Smooth-talking Southern charm. Laid-back but sharp.
background.ideals: Freedom. Music. Loyalty to those who earn it. Compassion as a weapon.
background.bonds: Fifth. The party. Mira. The music. The story that must be told.
background.flaws: Cannot resist a stage. Sometimes too clever for his own good.

feat.name: Wanderer
feat.text: Excellent memory for maps/geography. Find food and water for up to six people each day.

feat.name: War Caster
feat.text: Advantage on CON saves for concentration. Somatic with hands full. Spell as opportunity attack.

feat.name: Resilient (CON)
feat.text: CON +1 (included). Proficiency in CON saves (+8). With War Caster: Advantage + Prof on concentration.

feat.name: PENDING Level 16 ASI/Feat
feat.text: NOT YET CHOSEN. Options: Lucky, Inspiring Leader, +2 CON, +2 DEX, other.

feat.name: COMBAT COMBO REFERENCE
feat.text: KILL COMBO: BA Unsettling Words (-d20 save) then Action Hold Monster. Allies auto-crit paralyzed target. ROUND 1: Action Haste Fighter, BA Inspiration Cleric. REACTIONS: 1. Counterspell 2. Silvery Barbs 3. Infectious Inspiration. CONCENTRATION: Haste > Hold Monster > Hypnotic Pattern > Greater Invis.

feat.name: DAILY ROUTINE
feat.text: MORNING: 1. Foresight on Fighter (9th, 8h) 2. Mind Blank on self (8th, 24h). BEFORE SOCIAL: Glibness (8th, 1h, floor 32). BEFORE COMBAT: Haste Fighter (R1 Action), Inspiration Cleric (R1 BA).

item.name: Soulstring Banjo (Mythic Artifact)
item.text: Fifth’s soul. d20 Inspiration. See feat for full properties.

item.name: Resonance Key
item.text: Fifth speaks. 1/day d20+10 inspiration. 1/day amplified Crescendo.

item.name: Scale of Sardior
item.text: Draconic. 1/day Dominate Dragon DC 19. 1/day dragon lore.

item.name: Mirror of Hethara
item.text: Speak destination + intent = planar portal. Can scry.

item.name: Key to World Serpent Inn
item.text: Permanent room. Door appears when needed. Home.

item.name: Coin of Last Resort
item.text: ONE USE EVER. Impossible becomes possible. Unknown cost.

item.name: Coin of Mahadi Attention
item.text: ONE USE. He hears across any plane. No promises.

item.name: Stone of Zerth
item.text: Crush: 1 min charm/fear/psychic immunity. Mind unbreakable.
